text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
217 
MSIS_CASE_NUM 
LABEL: 
Encrypted TMSIS Case Number — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: The state-assigned number which uniquely identifies the Medicaid case to which the enrollee belongs; 
most recent in the calendar and the two prior years. 
The definition of a case varies. There are single-person cases (mostly aged and blind/disabled) and 
multi-person cases
